description_long: This is a freestanding, four-burner gas oven with a rectangular, boxy form and a slightly weathered, off-white finish. The stovetop features four black metal burner grates arranged in a square, each with a visible gas ring beneath. The front panel includes four round control knobs, a small indicator light, and a dark strip with faded labeling, suggesting a utilitarian design. The oven door is plain, lacking a window, and the handle is integrated horizontally across the top edge of the door. The sides and back are unadorned, with a consistent matte surface and no visible ventilation or decorative elements. The overall appearance is functional and industrial, suitable for urban or utilitarian environments.
description: A weathered, off-white freestanding gas oven with four burners, round control knobs, and a plain front door with an integrated handle. The design is utilitarian and industrial, with no visible window or ventilation features.
description_view_0: Front view showing four burner grates, four round control knobs, a dark control panel strip with faded labeling, and a plain oven door with an integrated horizontal handle.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the oven's boxy, unadorned side and the raised back control panel, with the stovetop burners partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a flat, featureless back panel with a consistent off-white finish and no visible controls or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the plain side surface and the raised back control panel, with the stovetop burners partially visible.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a horizontal strip above the oven door, featuring four evenly spaced round knobs and a small indicator light. The panel has a dark background with faded white labeling, and a triangular warning symbol is visible on the right. There are no digital displays or touchscreens, and the design is minimalistic and utilitarian.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is an integrated horizontal bar running along the top edge of the door, flush with the surface. It appears to be made of the same painted steel as the door, with no decorative or ergonomic enhancements.
